elements.title: a Love Island derivative
elements.contents: ... that a Love Island derivative (episode featured) has been described as "the perfect example of AI slop"?

elements.title: Rudolph Hering
elements.contents: ... that Rudolph Hering designed and constructed the water supply and sewerage for 150 cities?

elements.title: 2017 Chilean census
elements.contents: ... that 72,000 forms for the 2017 Chilean census from the Atacama Region, enough for 60% of its population, were damaged by heavy rains?

elements.title: Lin Daiyu
elements.contents: ... that the Chinese courtesan Lin Daiyu was reported to regularly "take baths" to escape debt?

elements.title: oxalate salts of plutonium
elements.contents: ... that oxalate salts of plutonium and neptunium, which have nuclear-power applications, can be produced in reactions using a form of vitamin C?

elements.title: Helen Shores Lee
elements.contents: ... that future Alabama judge Helen Shores Lee's house was bombed twice within two weeks?

elements.title: New Zealand's only dental school
elements.contents: ... that New Zealand's only dental school has 80 mannequins with removable jaws in one teaching space?

elements.title: Dem Rădulescu
elements.contents: ... that Romanian comedian Dem Rădulescu confronted spectators who mocked his serious rendition of Hamlet, grabbing one of them by the collar?

elements.title: Wooshkeetaan Kootéeyaa
elements.contents: ... that the Wooshkeetaan Kootéeyaa depicts Uncle Sam in reference to a US Navy attack on an Alaska Native village?
